zh.lifeSummary: 當Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda於大約0983年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，她的父親King Malcolm II of Scotland26歲，母親Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY22歲。她和Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1034年在英國蘇格蘭凱特內斯享年52歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda于大约0983年出生在苏格兰培爾阿爾时，她的父亲King Malcolm II of Scotland26岁，母亲Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY22岁。她和Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1034年在英国苏格兰凱特內斯享年52岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰奧可尼。

nameMeanings.name: meic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Serbian and Croatian (Medić): patronymic from Medo, a nickname derived from a diminutive of medved ‘bear’, or a nickname from another diminutive medić ‘little bear’. Compare Medich and Medick .
Bosniak (Medić): patronymic from the Bosniak Muslim personal name Medo, a short form of Mehmed, which is of Turkish and ultimately of Arabic origin (see Muhammad ).
Slovenian: nickname or occupational name derived from med ‘honey’. Compare Meditz .

variants.name: Meditz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Friedrich, Gerhard, Helmuth.

Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian   Medic  . In large part, it is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see   Kocevar  ), possibly as a translation of Gottscheerish   Hoenigman   into Slovenian, or vice versa.

variants.name: Medich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Serbian and Croatian Dragoljub, Marko.
Americanized form of Serbian, Croatian, and probably also Bosniak Medić (see Medic ).

variants.name: Medick
meanings: Americanized form of Serbian and Croatian (and possibly also Bosniak) Medić, Slovenian Medic .
German: unexplained. This surname is found mainly in the northeastern part of Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: ingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Ingegerd   and   Ingrid  , attested from the 16th-century.

nameMeanings.name: Maíl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

variants.name: Gael
meanings: Fanciful spelling of Gail , also occasionally written Gaelle .

variants.name: Gaelle
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

variants.name: Gaile
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

variants.name: Gayle
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gail .  The popularity of this form was no doubt increased by the fame of the American film actress  Gayle Hunnicutt  (  b. 1943 ).

nameMeanings.name: Coluim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Colm
meanings: Traditional Irish form of the Late Latin personal name Columba ‘dove’. See Callum .

en.lifeSummary: When Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda was born about 0983, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, King Malcolm II of Scotland, was 26 and her mother, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout". She died in 1034, in Caithness, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda est née environ 0983, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, King Malcolm II of Scotland, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout". Elle est décédée en 1034, à Caithness, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda um 0983 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Malcolm II of Scotland 26 und ihre Mutter Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY 22. Sie hatte mit Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1034 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Caithness, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda è nata il circa 0983 nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, King Malcolm II of Scotland, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout". Morì nel 1034, nel Caithness, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináedaが約0983年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父King Malcolm II of Scotlandは26歳，母Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORYは22歳であった。彼女はEarl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"との間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1034年にイギリススコットランドケイスネスで52歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドオルクニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda(이)가 대략 0983년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Malcolm II of Scotland(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1034년 영국 스코틀랜드 케이스네스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 르니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda nasceu aproximadamente 0983, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, King Malcolm II of Scotland, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout". Ela faleceu em 1034, em Caithness, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda родилась около 0983 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени King Malcolm II of Scotland было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout". Она умерла в 1034 г. в местности цеитнесс, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности орни, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda nació aproximadamente 0983, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, King Malcolm II of Scotland, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout". Murió en 1034, en Caithness, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido.
